forWhom: Admission to B.Tech/B.Arch at NITs, IIITs, CFTIs, and eligibility for JEE Advanced

conductedBy: One of the seven zonal IITs (under JAB)
forWhom: Admission to B.Tech/B.S/Integrated programs at all 23 IITs

examName: NEET UG (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test)
forWhom: Admission to MBBS, BDS, Ayush courses, and Veterinary seats in India
Admission to State Engineering, Agriculture, and Pharmacy colleges
Admission to Integrated First Degree (B.E, B.Pharm, M.Sc) at BITS Pilani, Goa, and Hyderabad campuses
Admission to 5-year integrated Undergrad (BA LLB, BBA LLB) and PG (LLM) programs at 24 NLUs

conductedBy: Law School Admission Council (LSAC) / Pearson VUE
forWhom: Admission to BA LLB, LLB, and LLM courses in participating private law colleges (Jindal Global, etc.)

examName: IPMAT (Integrated Program in Management Aptitude Test)
forWhom: Admission to 5-year Integrated Program in Management (IPM) at IIM Indore, IIM Rohtak, Ranchi, and NALSAR
Admission to Army, Navy, and Air Force wings of National Defence Academy and Naval Academy course
Admission to Indian Military Academy, Officers Training Academy, Indian Naval Academy, and Air Force Academy
Commissioning in Flying and Ground Duty (Technical and Non-Technical) branches of IAF

conductedBy: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
forWhom: Entry level examination for the Chartered Accountancy course in India

conductedBy: National Institute of Fashion Technology / NTA
forWhom: Admission to B.Des, B.FTech, M.Des, M.F.M, and M.FTech at NIFT campuses
mode: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Creative Ability Test (Drawing)

forWhom: Admission to Bachelor of Design (B.Des) and Master of Design (M.Des) at NID campuses

examName: UCEED (Undergraduate Common Entrance Examination for Design)
forWhom: Admission to Bachelor of Design (B.Des) programs at IIT Bombay, IIT Delhi, IIT Guwahati, IIT Hyderabad, and IIITDM Jabalpur
mode: Computer Based (Part A) + Drawing Sheet (Part B)

forWhom: Admission to Master of Design (M.Des) and Ph.D. programs in Design at IITs and IISc
mode: Computer Based (Part A) + Drawing Sheet (Part B)

forWhom: Admission to Bachelor Degree programs in Agriculture and Allied Sciences in Agricultural Universities
Admission to Undergrad courses in all Central Universities (DU, BHU, JNU, etc.) and participating institutes
Admission to BA LLB (Hons), LLM, and Ph.D. programs at National Law University, Delhi only
Admission to B.Tech programs at VIT Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, and AP campuses
